The '''PI-Series medical assistant droid''' was a [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] manufactured by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]], that was mainly used by medical researchers throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It could not perform medical aid on its own, as it was incapable of making critical decisions, and had to be paired with either a living [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] or a [[3Z3 medical droid]].

[[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Maladi]] made use of these droids in her [[Darth Maladi's laboratory|laboratory]] during interrogation sessions, as they would assist her without disturbing her, unlike living assistants.
